market_summary.DJIA: Stock markets are seeing a mixed global performance today as investors digest conflicting reports regarding US-Iran conflict de-escalation talks. Crude oil prices are volatile, dropping below $100 after hitting highs.
market_summary.context: Market is focusing on US economic data releases (PMI) and geopolitical developments. Investors are cautious amid ongoing volatility.

art_highlights.detail: Market shows renewed confidence with a focus on high-end rare works. Private sales and digital art continue to gain influence as hubs like Paris and the Middle East strengthen.
Continued focus on ABHK; strong representation of international galleries and institutional interest in both historical and contemporary segments.
Smart Museum of Art continues 'Composing Color: Paintings by Alma Thomas' through July 5th.
